summary: Tested Scout page after AIBot 3D component removal. All 19 backend tests pass (including 4 new Scout API tests). Scout page loads without errors - no AIBot reference error. All Scout functionality works: Event Concierge tab, Opportunity Hunter tab, tab switching, Back to Home button. Login flow works with test credentials. Profile page loads correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scout page AIBot removal verified. Page loads without Three.js errors. Event Concierge shows 3 default sources (Solana Events, Crypto Nomads, ETH Global) with 'Start Event Scan' button. Opportunity Hunter shows 4 sources (Crypto Jobs, Web3 Career, Gitcoin Grants, Devfolio Hackathons) with goal input and 'Start Opportunity Hunt' button. Tab switching works. Back to Home works. Login with test@scout.com/test1234 works. Profile page shows user info correctly. TinyFish scraping API is real integration but not tested in this run.
features_tested: Scout page loads without AIBot reference error
Event Concierge tab with scan sources and action panel
Opportunity Hunter tab with goal input and sources
Tab switching between Event Concierge and Opportunity Hunter
Profile page loads at /profile after login
Landing page loads with Hero, Globe, Sign In, Get Started
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. AIBot component was successfully removed from ScoutPage.jsx. The page now uses a simpler layout without Three.js 3D animation.
